description: Cross-skill integration tests verifying multi-skill workflows and context passing in the Aria Ten-Step Cycle

evals.name: full-feature-cycle-a-to-d
evals.description: Complete A->B->C->D cycle for a new feature, verifying context flows from spec to PR to archive
evals.prompt: Execute full ten-step cycle for implementing a user notification feature
evals.context_chain: spec_id -> task_list -> branch_name -> commit_sha -> pr_url -> archive_path

assertions.name: phase_a_produces_spec
assertions.description: Phase A must produce proposal.md with valid spec_id

assertions.name: phase_a_produces_tasks
assertions.description: Phase A must produce detailed-tasks.yaml with task IDs referencing spec_id

assertions.name: phase_b_creates_branch
assertions.description: Phase B must create branch named feature/{module}/{task-id}-{desc}

assertions.name: phase_c_references_spec
assertions.description: Phase C commit/PR must reference the original spec_id

assertions.name: phase_d_archives_spec
assertions.description: Phase D must archive spec to openspec/archive/ (not standards/)

assertions.name: context_chain_unbroken
assertions.description: Each phase output must contain reference to previous phase artifact

evals.name: quickfix-with-tdd-double-insurance
evals.description: Quick bugfix using Phase B->C only, verifying TDD double-insurance (Method A + Method B)
evals.prompt: Fix a null pointer exception in the payment service - simple 3-file change

assertions.name: skips_phase_a
assertions.description: Level 1 change should skip Phase A (no spec needed)

assertions.name: tdd_method_b_session_hook
assertions.description: workflow-runner pre-hook should activate TDD enforcer at session level

assertions.name: tdd_method_a_subagent
assertions.description: subagent-driver should pass TDD constraints to Fresh Subagent

assertions.name: commit_type_is_fix
assertions.description: Commit message must use 'fix' type for bugfix

assertions.name: branch_mode_is_branch
assertions.description: Simple 3-file fix should use Branch mode (not Worktree)

evals.name: cross-module-worktree-coordination
evals.description: Cross-module change requiring Worktree mode, strategic commit grouping, and multi-module PR
evals.prompt: Implement API versioning across backend (Python) and mobile (Flutter) with database migration

assertions.name: selects_worktree_mode
assertions.description: Cross-module (>5 files, 2+ modules) should trigger Worktree auto-selection (score >= 3)

assertions.name: agent_router_assigns_correctly
assertions.description: agent-router should assign backend-architect for API and mobile-developer for Flutter

assertions.name: strategic_commit_groups_by_module
assertions.description: Commits should be grouped by module (backend group + mobile group + migration group)

assertions.name: commit_messages_have_correct_scopes
assertions.description: Each commit group should have appropriate scope (api, mobile, db)

evals.name: brainstorm-to-spec-pipeline
evals.description: Brainstorm session producing decisions that flow into spec-drafter and task-planner
evals.prompt: We need a caching layer but unsure about Redis vs Memcached vs in-memory - explore options and create spec

assertions.name: brainstorm_produces_decision_matrix
assertions.description: Brainstorm should generate comparison matrix for Redis/Memcached/in-memory

assertions.name: spec_references_decision
assertions.description: spec-drafter output should reference the brainstorm decision

assertions.name: spec_level_at_least_2
assertions.description: Caching feature with exploration should be Level 2 or 3

assertions.name: tasks_include_implementation_and_test
assertions.description: task-planner should include both implementation and test tasks

evals.name: phase-boundary-error-recovery
evals.description: Test failure at B->C boundary: branch-finisher detects failing tests, user retries, then proceeds to C
evals.prompt: Complete development but tests are failing - handle the failure and retry

assertions.name: detects_test_failure
assertions.description: branch-finisher must detect and report test failures

assertions.name: offers_retry_option
assertions.description: branch-finisher should offer option to continue modifying (not just abort)

assertions.name: revalidation_after_fix
assertions.description: After fix, branch-finisher should re-run validation

assertions.name: proceeds_to_phase_c
assertions.description: After successful retry, should proceed to Phase C commit

assertions.name: no_context_loss
assertions.description: Branch name and task context must be preserved across retry

evals.name: closure-state-consistency
evals.description: After C->D transition, verify state-scanner reflects completed state and UPM is consistent
evals.prompt: PR merged successfully - execute closure phase and verify project state

assertions.name: progress_updater_writes_state_block
assertions.description: D.1 must write UPMv2-STATE block with updated completion percentage

assertions.name: archive_moves_spec_correctly
assertions.description: D.2 must move spec from changes/ to archive/ with preserved metadata

assertions.name: state_scanner_shows_clean
assertions.description: After closure, state-scanner should show no active specs in changes/

assertions.name: requirements_sync_updated
assertions.description: requirements-sync should reflect completed status in UPM

assertions.name: atomic_state_update
assertions.description: D.1 and D.2 should complete atomically (both succeed or neither)
